# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a multi-service application container that runs a web server (port 80), API server (port 8080), database (port 5432), and Redis (port 6379). Expose all necessary ports so the services can communicate. This is for our all-in-one development container.
# Category: container_security

FROM ubuntu:22.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install dependencies
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    nginx \
    nodejs \
    npm \
    postgresql \
    postgresql-contrib \
    redis-server \
    supervisor \
    curl \
    wget \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Configure Nginx (Web Server - port 80)
COPY nginx.conf /etc/nginx/sites-available/default 2>/dev/null || true
RUN echo 'server { \n\
    listen 80; \n\
    server_name localhost; \n\
    root /var/www/html; \n\
    index index.html; \n\
    location / { \n\
        try_files $uri $uri/ =404; \n\
    } \n\
}' > /etc/nginx/sites-available/default

# Create web root and a default page
RUN mkdir -p /var/www/html && \
    echo '<html><body><h1>Dev Container Web Server</h1></body></html>' > /var/www/html/index.html

# Setup API server directory
RUN mkdir -p /app/api
WORKDIR /app/api

# Create a basic API server
RUN echo '{\n\
  "name": "api-server",\n\
  "version": "1.0.0",\n\
  "main": "server.js",\n\
  "dependencies": {\n\
    "express": "^4.18.0"\n\
  }\n\
}' > package.json

RUN npm install

RUN echo 'const express = require("express");\n\
const app = express();\n\
app.get("/", (req, res) => res.json({ status: "ok", service: "api" }));\n\
app.get("/health", (req, res) => res.json({ healthy: true }));\n\
app.listen(8080, "0.0.0.0", () => console.log("API server running on port 8080"));\n\
' > server.js

# Configure PostgreSQL
USER postgres
RUN /etc/init.d/postgresql start && \
    psql --command "ALTER USER postgres WITH PASSWORD 'devpassword';" && \
    createdb devdb && \
    /etc/init.d/postgresql stop

USER root

# Configure PostgreSQL to listen on all interfaces
RUN echo "listen_addresses = '*'" >> /etc/postgresql/14/main/postgresql.conf && \
    echo "host all all 0.0.0.0/0 md5" >> /etc/postgresql/14/main/pg_hba.conf

# Configure Redis to listen on all interfaces
RUN sed -i 's/bind 127.0.0.1 ::1/bind 0.0.0.0/' /etc/redis/redis.conf && \
    sed -i 's/protected-mode yes/protected-mode no/' /etc/redis/redis.conf

# Setup Supervisor to manage all services
RUN mkdir -p /var/log/supervisor

RUN echo '[supervisord]\n\
nodaemon=true\n\
logfile=/var/log/supervisor/supervisord.log\n\
pidfile=/var/run/supervisord.pid\n\
\n\
[program:nginx]\n\
command=/usr/sbin/nginx -g "daemon off;"\n\
autostart=true\n\
autorestart=true\n\
stdout_logfile=/var/log/supervisor/nginx-stdout.log\n\
stderr_logfile=/var/log/supervisor/nginx-stderr.log\n\
\n\
[program:api]\n\
command=node /app/api/server.js\n\
autostart=true\n\
autorestart=true\n\
stdout_logfile=/var/log/supervisor/api-stdout.log\n\
stderr_logfile=/var/log/supervisor/api-stderr.log\n\
\n\
[program:postgresql]\n\
command=/usr/lib/postgresql/14/bin/postgres -D /var/lib/postgresql/14/main -c config_file=/etc/postgresql/14/main/postgresql.conf\n\
user=postgres\n\
autostart=true\n\
autorestart=true\n\
stdout_logfile=/var/log/supervisor/postgresql-stdout.log\n\
stderr_logfile=/var/log/supervisor/postgresql-stderr.log\n\
\n\
[program:redis]\n\
command=/usr/bin/redis-server /etc/redis/redis.conf\n\
autostart=true\n\
autorestart=true\n\
stdout_logfile=/var/log/supervisor/redis-stdout.log\n\
stderr_logfile=/var/log/supervisor/redis-stderr.log\n\
' > /etc/supervisor/conf.d/services.conf

# Create a healthcheck script
RUN echo '#!/bin/bash\n\
curl -sf http://localhost:80/ > /dev/null && \\\n\
curl -sf http://localhost:8080/health > /dev/null && \\\n\
pg_isready -h localhost -p 5432 > /dev/null && \\\n\
redis-cli -h localhost -p 6379 ping > /dev/null\n\
' > /healthcheck.sh && chmod +x /healthcheck.sh

HEALTHCHECK --interval=30s --timeout=10s --start-period=60s --retries=3 \
    CMD /healthcheck.sh

# Expose all service ports
EXPOSE 80 8080 5432 6379

# Create shared data volumes
VOLUME ["/var/lib/postgresql/14/main", "/var/www/html", "/app/api", "/var/log/supervisor"]

WORKDIR /app

CMD ["/usr/bin/supervisord", "-c", "/etc/supervisor/conf.d/services.conf"]
